creator: andrewb@cs.cmu.edu
text:
Hi,

Please don't use this patch!

Can we use ports/131631 instead?  I sent this to FreeBSD about three weeks
ago to accomplish the same upgrade.

My patch additionally includes improvements to the installation process and
support for the smlnj-devel and mlton compilers.

Thanks,

-andrew

On Fri, Mar 6, 2009 at 2:10 PM, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:

> Maintainer of lang/twelf,
>
> Please note that PR ports/132357 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/132357
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
>
